case_for: Hopkins has a proven ceiling as shown by his 28.6-point explosion in week 9 and a solid 14.5-point outing just last week, indicating he can still deliver top-tier fantasy production when targets come his way.
case_against: His volatile recent floor—multiple games under 6 points in the last six weeks—shows he's boom-or-bust and can easily fail to reach 12 points if target share dips.
